1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_depot_unmake}
3	
4	The
5	{rbtr_payor}
6	destroys an
7	{rbtgi_depot}
8	and all contained resources:
9	
10	//axhopt_typed_parameter
11	{rbtgi_depot_project}
12	. *Safety Confirmation*:
13	.. If `RBGP_CONFIRM_DESTROY` environment variable is set:
14	... {rbbc_require}
15	value matches the depot project ID argument
16	... Proceed without interactive confirmation
17	.. Otherwise:
18	... Display comprehensive destruction warnings
19	... {rbbc_require}
20	operator confirmation with exact depot project ID (interactive)
21	
22	//axhos_step
23	. *Authenticate as
24	{rbtr_payor}*:
25	.. Execute
26	{rbtoe_payor_authenticate}
27	.. {rbbc_require}
28	authentication successful
29	
30	//axhos_step
31	. *Validate Target Depot*:
32	.. {rbbc_require}
33	depot project ID provided as first argument
34	.. {rbbc_store}
35	`«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` from argument
36	.. {rbbc_call}
37	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
38	.. {rbbc_require}
39	project exists and state is `ACTIVE`
40	.. {rbbc_fatal}
41	if state is already `DELETE_REQUESTED`: "Project already marked for deletion"
42	
43	//axhos_step
44	. *Check for and remove
45	{gcp_lien_s}*:
46	.. {rbbc_call}
47	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v1/liens/list[liens.list] to list existing liens on resource: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
48	.. {rbbc_store}
49	`«LIEN_LIST»` from response `.liens[]`
50	.. For each lien in `«LIEN_LIST»`:
51	... {rbbc_call}
52	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v1/liens/delete[liens.delete] to delete lien using `.name` field
53	... {rbbc_require}
54	HTTP 200 response for each lien deletion
55	.. {rbbc_require}
56	all liens removed before proceeding
57	
58	//axhos_step
59	. *Unlink billing account*:
60	.. {rbbc_call}
61	link:https://cloud.google.com/billing/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects/updateBillingInfo[cloudbilling.projects.updateBillingInfo] with body `{"billingAccountName":""}` for `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
62	.. {rbbc_require}
63	billing unlink successful (HTTP 200)
64	.. Note: Unlinking BEFORE deletion releases billing quota immediately; deletion without unlink leaves quota consumed for 30-day retention period
65	
66	//axhos_step
67	. *Delete Dual Worker Pools*:
68	.. For each pool suffix (`-tether`, `-airgap`):
69	... Construct pool resource name: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}/workerPools/rbw-«INPUT_DEPOT_NAME»-pool«SUFFIX»`
70	... {rbbc_call}
71	link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.workerPools/delete[workerPools.delete] for the pool resource name
72	... Treat HTTP 404 as success (pool already gone — tolerated)
73	.. {rbbc_require}
74	HTTP 200 or 404 response for both pools; any other status is {rbbc_fatal}
75	
76	//axhos_step
77	. *Initiate depot deletion*:
78	.. {rbbc_submit}
79	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/delete[projects.delete] to execute project deletion for `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
80	.. {rbbc_store}
81	`«DELETE_OPERATION»` from response if Long Running Operation returned
82	.. {rbbc_await}
83	`«DELETE_OPERATION»` if applicable
84	.. {rbbc_require}
85	deletion initiated successfully
86	
87	//axhos_step
88	. *Verify deletion transition*:
89	.. {rbbc_call}
90	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get] to query project state for `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
91	.. {rbbc_poll}
92	project state with 5-second intervals for up to 60 seconds
93	.. {rbbc_require}
94	project state equals `DELETE_REQUESTED`
95	
96	//axhoc_completion
97	Successful execution destroys depot infrastructure.
98	
99	NOTE: Depot deletion automatically removes all infrastructure created by
100	{rbtgo_depot_levy}:
101	the
102	{rbtr_mason}
103	service account,
104	{rbtgi_build_bucket},
105	{rbtgi_repository},
106	and any
107	{rbtr_governor},
108	{rbtr_director},
109	or
110	{rbtr_retriever}
111	service accounts created within the depot.
112	Both worker pools (tether and airgap) are explicitly deleted before project deletion because GCP project deletion does not automatically cascade to worker pool resources — an undrained pool can block or delay the delete operation.
113	
114	NOTE: Project enters 30-day retention period in
115	{gcp_delete_requested}
116	state.
117	Use
118	{rbbc_call}
119	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/undelete[projects.undelete] to recover project if needed within retention window.

content.content:
900	
901	  buc_step 'Provision Cloud Build service agent'
902	  # The Cloud Build Service Agent (service-{PN}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com)
903	  # needs serviceAccountTokenCreator on Mason to impersonate it during builds.create.
904	  # The service agent is auto-created when the Cloud Build API is enabled; its email is
905	  # deterministic from the project number. See RBSCIP for the two-SA distinction.
906	  rbgu_provision_service_agent "cloudbuild" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" > /dev/null \
907	    || buc_die "Failed to provision Cloud Build service agent"
908	  local -r z_cb_service_agent="service-${z_project_number}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
909	  buc_log_args "CB service agent: ${z_cb_service_agent}"
910	
911	  buc_step 'Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate Mason'
912	  rbgi_add_sa_iam_role "${z_token}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_cb_service_agent}" "roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator"
913	
914	  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
915	  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_die "Failed to update depot tracking after creation"
916	
917	  buc_success 'Depot creation successful'
918	  buc_info "Next: mantle Governor for this depot:"
919	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
920	}
921	
922	rbgp_depot_unmake() {
923	  zrbgp_sentinel
924	
925	  buc_doc_brief "DANGER: Permanently destroy an entire depot infrastructure"
926	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
927	
928	  buc_step 'Safety confirmation required'
929	  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} and ALL resources" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
930	
931	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
932	  local z_token
933	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
934	
935	  buc_step 'Validate target depot'
936	  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
937	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_validate"
938	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "depot_destroy_validate"
939	  
940	  local z_lifecycle_state
941	  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_validate" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
942	  
943	  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "ACTIVE"; then
944	    if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
945	      buc_die "Project already marked for deletion"
946	    else
947	      buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only destroy ACTIVE projects"
948	    fi
949	  fi
950	
951	  buc_step 'Clean up governor service accounts (404-tolerant)'
952	  # No standalone demantle verb — governor SA lifecycle ends here.  Project
953	  # deletion would clean these up implicitly, but an explicit DELETE pass
954	  # gives diagnostic visibility and makes the cleanup contract testable.
955	  local -r z_unmake_sa_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
956	  local z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
957	  local z_unmake_sa_page=1
958	  local z_unmake_sa_url=""
959	  local z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=""
960	  local z_unmake_sa_infix=""
961	  local z_unmake_sa_count=0
962	  local z_unmake_sa_index=0
963	  local z_unmake_sa_email=""
964	  local z_unmake_gov_delete_infix=""
965	  local z_governor_sa_count=0
966	  while :; do
967	    z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url_base}"
968	    if test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}"; then
969	      z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}") \
970	        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
971	      z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_unmake_sa_tok_enc}"
972	    fi
973	    z_unmake_sa_infix="depot_unmake_gov_list_${z_unmake_sa_page}"
974	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_unmake_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"
975	    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_unmake_sa_page})" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"
976	
977	    z_unmake_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
978	      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"
979	
980	    z_unmake_sa_index=0
981	    while test "${z_unmake_sa_index}" -lt "${z_unmake_sa_count}"; do
982	      z_unmake_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_unmake_sa_index}].email") \
983	        || { z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
984	      if [[ "${z_unmake_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
985	        buc_log_args "Deleting governor SA: ${z_unmake_sa_email}"
986	        z_unmake_gov_delete_infix="depot_unmake_gov_delete_${z_governor_sa_count}"
987	        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_unmake_sa_url_base}/${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}"
988	        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete governor SA ${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}" \
989	          404 "not found (already deleted)"
990	        z_governor_sa_count=$((z_governor_sa_count + 1))
991	      fi
992	      z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1))
993	    done
994	
995	    z_unmake_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
996	      || z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
997	    test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}" || break
998	    z_unmake_sa_page=$((z_unmake_sa_page + 1))
999	  done
1000	  buc_info "Governor SA cleanup: removed ${z_governor_sa_count} account(s)"
1001	
1002	  buc_step 'Check for and remove liens'
1003	  local -r z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1004	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_liens_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
1005	  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
1006	  
1007	  local z_lien_count
1008	  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
1009	  
1010	  if test "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0; then
1011	    buc_log_args "Found ${z_lien_count} lien(s) - removing them"
1012	    local z_lien_names
1013	    z_lien_names=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens[].name' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to extract lien names"
1014	    
1015	    for z_lien_name in ${z_lien_names}; do
1016	      if test -n "${z_lien_name}"; then
1017	        buc_log_args "Removing lien: ${z_lien_name}"
1018	        local z_delete_lien_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens/${z_lien_name}"
1019	        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_lien_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
1020	        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete lien" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
1021	      fi
1022	    done
1023	  fi
1024	
1025	  buc_step 'Unlink billing account (releases quota immediately)'
1026	  local -r z_billing_unlink_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_unlink.json"
1027	  echo '{"billingAccountName":""}' > "${z_billing_unlink_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing unlink body"
1028	
1029	  local -r z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/billingInfo"
1030	  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_unlink_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_billing_unlink" "${z_billing_unlink_body}"
1031	
1032	  local z_billing_unlink_code
1033	  z_billing_unlink_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_billing_unlink") || z_billing_unlink_code=""
1034	  if test "${z_billing_unlink_code}" = "200"; then
1035	    buc_log_args "Billing account unlinked - quota released"
1036	  else
1037	    buc_warn "Could not unlink billing (HTTP ${z_billing_unlink_code}) - proceeding with deletion anyway"
1038	  fi
1039	
1040	  buc_step 'Delete dual worker pools (if exist)'
1041	  # Delete tether pool
1042	  local -r z_tether_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
1043	  local -r z_tether_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_tether_del_id}"
1044	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_tether_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_tether"
1045	  local z_tether_del_code
1046	  z_tether_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_tether") || z_tether_del_code=""
1047	  case "${z_tether_del_code}" in
1048	    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code}" ;;
1049	    *) buc_warn "Tether pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
1050	  esac
1051	
1052	  # Delete airgap pool
1053	  local -r z_airgap_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
1054	  local -r z_airgap_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_airgap_del_id}"
1055	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_airgap_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_airgap"
1056	  local z_airgap_del_code
1057	  z_airgap_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_airgap") || z_airgap_del_code=""
1058	  case "${z_airgap_del_code}" in
1059	    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code}" ;;
1060	    *) buc_warn "Airgap pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
1061	  esac
1062	
1063	  buc_step 'Initiate depot deletion'
1064	  local -r z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1065	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_delete"
1066	  
1067	  local z_delete_response
1068	  z_delete_response=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_delete") || buc_die "Failed to get deletion response code"
1069	  
1070	  if test "${z_delete_response}" = "200" || test "${z_delete_response}" = "204"; then
1071	    buc_log_args "Project deletion initiated successfully"
1072	  else
1073	    local z_error_msg
1074	    z_error_msg=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_delete" '.error.message // "Unknown error"') || z_error_msg="HTTP ${z_delete_response}"
1075	    buc_die "Failed to initiate project deletion: ${z_error_msg}"
1076	  fi
1077	
1078	  buc_step 'Verify deletion state transition'
1079	  local -r z_max_attempts=12
1080	  local z_attempt=1
1081	  local z_final_state
1082	  
1083	  while test "${z_attempt}" -le "${z_max_attempts}"; do
1084	    sleep 5
1085	    buc_log_args "Checking deletion state (attempt ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts})"
1086	    
1087	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_state_check"
1088	
1089	    local z_state_check_code
1090	    z_state_check_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_state_check") || z_state_check_code=""
1091	    if test "${z_state_check_code}" = "200"; then
1092	      z_final_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_state_check" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || z_final_state="UNKNOWN"
1093	
1094	      if test "${z_final_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
1095	        break
1096	      fi
1097	    fi
1098	    
1099	    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
1100	  done
1101	  
1102	  if test "${z_final_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
1103	    buc_die "Failed to verify deletion state transition. Current state: ${z_final_state}"
1104	  fi
1105	
1106	  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
1107	  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_log_args "Warning: Failed to update depot tracking after deletion"
1108	
1109	  # Success
1110	  buc_success "Depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} successfully marked for deletion"
1111	  buc_info "Project Status: DELETE_REQUESTED"
1112	  buc_info "Billing: Unlinked (quota released immediately)"

1115	}

file.content:
buc_step 'Provision Cloud Build service agent'
  # The Cloud Build Service Agent (service-{PN}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com)
  # needs serviceAccountTokenCreator on Mason to impersonate it during builds.create.
  # The service agent is auto-created when the Cloud Build API is enabled; its email is
  # deterministic from the project number. See RBSCIP for the two-SA distinction.
  rbgu_provision_service_agent "cloudbuild" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" > /dev/null \
    || buc_die "Failed to provision Cloud Build service agent"
  local -r z_cb_service_agent="service-${z_project_number}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
  buc_log_args "CB service agent: ${z_cb_service_agent}"

  buc_step 'Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate Mason'
  rbgi_add_sa_iam_role "${z_token}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_cb_service_agent}" "roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator"

  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_die "Failed to update depot tracking after creation"

  buc_success 'Depot creation successful'
  buc_info "Next: mantle Governor for this depot:"
  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
}

rbgp_depot_unmake() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "DANGER: Permanently destroy an entire depot infrastructure"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Safety confirmation required'
  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} and ALL resources" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Validate target depot'
  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_validate"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "depot_destroy_validate"
  
  local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_validate" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
  
  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "ACTIVE"; then
    if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
      buc_die "Project already marked for deletion"
    else
      buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only destroy ACTIVE projects"
    fi
  fi

  buc_step 'Clean up governor service accounts (404-tolerant)'
  # No standalone demantle verb — governor SA lifecycle ends here.  Project
  # deletion would clean these up implicitly, but an explicit DELETE pass
  # gives diagnostic visibility and makes the cleanup contract testable.
  local -r z_unmake_sa_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
  local z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
  local z_unmake_sa_page=1
  local z_unmake_sa_url=""
  local z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=""
  local z_unmake_sa_infix=""
  local z_unmake_sa_count=0
  local z_unmake_sa_index=0
  local z_unmake_sa_email=""
  local z_unmake_gov_delete_infix=""
  local z_governor_sa_count=0
  while :; do
    z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url_base}"
    if test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}"; then
      z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}") \
        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
      z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_unmake_sa_tok_enc}"
    fi
    z_unmake_sa_infix="depot_unmake_gov_list_${z_unmake_sa_page}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_unmake_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"
    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_unmake_sa_page})" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"

    z_unmake_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"

    z_unmake_sa_index=0
    while test "${z_unmake_sa_index}" -lt "${z_unmake_sa_count}"; do
      z_unmake_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_unmake_sa_index}].email") \
        || { z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
      if [[ "${z_unmake_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Deleting governor SA: ${z_unmake_sa_email}"
        z_unmake_gov_delete_infix="depot_unmake_gov_delete_${z_governor_sa_count}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_unmake_sa_url_base}/${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}"
        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete governor SA ${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}" \
          404 "not found (already deleted)"
        z_governor_sa_count=$((z_governor_sa_count + 1))
      fi
      z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1))
    done

    z_unmake_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
      || z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
    test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}" || break
    z_unmake_sa_page=$((z_unmake_sa_page + 1))
  done
  buc_info "Governor SA cleanup: removed ${z_governor_sa_count} account(s)"

  buc_step 'Check for and remove liens'
  local -r z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_liens_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
  
  local z_lien_count
  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
  
  if test "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0; then
    buc_log_args "Found ${z_lien_count} lien(s) - removing them"
    local z_lien_names
    z_lien_names=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens[].name' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to extract lien names"
    
    for z_lien_name in ${z_lien_names}; do
      if test -n "${z_lien_name}"; then
        buc_log_args "Removing lien: ${z_lien_name}"
        local z_delete_lien_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens/${z_lien_name}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_lien_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete lien" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
      fi
    done
  fi

  buc_step 'Unlink billing account (releases quota immediately)'
  local -r z_billing_unlink_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_unlink.json"
  echo '{"billingAccountName":""}' > "${z_billing_unlink_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing unlink body"

  local -r z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/billingInfo"
  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_unlink_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_billing_unlink" "${z_billing_unlink_body}"

  local z_billing_unlink_code
  z_billing_unlink_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_billing_unlink") || z_billing_unlink_code=""
  if test "${z_billing_unlink_code}" = "200"; then
    buc_log_args "Billing account unlinked - quota released"
  else
    buc_warn "Could not unlink billing (HTTP ${z_billing_unlink_code}) - proceeding with deletion anyway"
  fi

  buc_step 'Delete dual worker pools (if exist)'
  # Delete tether pool
  local -r z_tether_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
  local -r z_tether_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_tether_del_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_tether_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_tether"
  local z_tether_del_code
  z_tether_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_tether") || z_tether_del_code=""
  case "${z_tether_del_code}" in
    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code}" ;;
    *) buc_warn "Tether pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
  esac

  # Delete airgap pool
  local -r z_airgap_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
  local -r z_airgap_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_airgap_del_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_airgap_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_airgap"
  local z_airgap_del_code
  z_airgap_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_airgap") || z_airgap_del_code=""
  case "${z_airgap_del_code}" in
    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code}" ;;
    *) buc_warn "Airgap pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
  esac

  buc_step 'Initiate depot deletion'
  local -r z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_delete"
  
  local z_delete_response
  z_delete_response=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_delete") || buc_die "Failed to get deletion response code"
  
  if test "${z_delete_response}" = "200" || test "${z_delete_response}" = "204"; then
    buc_log_args "Project deletion initiated successfully"
  else
    local z_error_msg
    z_error_msg=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_delete" '.error.message // "Unknown error"') || z_error_msg="HTTP ${z_delete_response}"
    buc_die "Failed to initiate project deletion: ${z_error_msg}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Verify deletion state transition'
  local -r z_max_attempts=12
  local z_attempt=1
  local z_final_state
  
  while test "${z_attempt}" -le "${z_max_attempts}"; do
    sleep 5
    buc_log_args "Checking deletion state (attempt ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts})"
    
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_state_check"

    local z_state_check_code
    z_state_check_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_state_check") || z_state_check_code=""
    if test "${z_state_check_code}" = "200"; then
      z_final_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_state_check" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || z_final_state="UNKNOWN"

      if test "${z_final_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
        break
      fi
    fi
    
    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
  done
  
  if test "${z_final_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
    buc_die "Failed to verify deletion state transition. Current state: ${z_final_state}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_log_args "Warning: Failed to update depot tracking after deletion"

  # Success
  buc_success "Depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} successfully marked for deletion"
  buc_info "Project Status: DELETE_REQUESTED"
  buc_info "Billing: Unlinked (quota released immediately)"
  buc_info "Grace period: Up to 30 days before permanent removal"
  buc_info "All infrastructure (Mason SA, repository, bucket) will be automatically removed"
}

rbgp_depot_list() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion guard
24	test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
25	ZRBZ_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Colophon registry initialization
29	
30	zrbz_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"
32	
33	  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
34	  zbuz_sentinel
35	
36	  # Accounts — Google Cloud service accounts (rbw-a)
37	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ACCOUNTS   "rbw-a"   "Accounts — Service account management"
38	  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
39	  buz_enroll RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR         "rbw-aM"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_mantle"       ""        "Create/replace governor service account"
40	  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
41	  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_retriever"      "param1"  "Invest a Retriever service account for an identity"
42	  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_director"       "param1"  "Invest a Director service account for an identity"
43	  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_retriever"      "param1"  "Divest a Retriever service account by identity"
44	  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_director"       "param1"  "Divest a Director service account by identity"
45	  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_RETRIEVERS       "rbw-arr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_retrievers"     ""        "Roster Retriever service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"
46	  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_DIRECTORS        "rbw-adr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_directors"      ""        "Roster Director service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"
47	
48	  # Crucible — container runtime (rbw-c)
49	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_CRUCIBLE   "rbw-c"   "Crucible — Container runtime"
50	  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
51	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE  "rbw-cC"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_charge"       "imprint"  "Charge crucible (sentry + pentacle + bottle containers)"
52	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH  "rbw-cQ"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_quench"       "imprint"  "Quench crucible"
53	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SSH     "rbw-cS"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ssh"          "imprint"  "SSH into the bottle container"
54	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_HAIL    "rbw-ch"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_hail"         "param1"   "Shell into the sentry container"
55	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK    "rbw-cr"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_rack"         "param1"   "Shell into the bottle container"
56	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SCRY    "rbw-cs"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_scry"         "param1"   "Observe network traffic on crucible containers"
57	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_WRIT    "rbw-cw"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_writ"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in sentry container"
58	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_FIAT    "rbw-cf"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_fiat"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in pentacle container"
59	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_BARK    "rbw-cb"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_bark"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in bottle container"
60	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_ACTIVE  "rbw-cic" "${z_mod}" "rbob_charged"      "param1"   "Check if crucible is currently charged"
61	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE "rbw-cKB" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_bottle" "param1" "Kludge bottle vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"
62	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_SENTRY "rbw-cKS" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_sentry" "param1" "Kludge sentry vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"
63	
64	  # Depot — GCP project infrastructure (rbw-d, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
65	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_DEPOT      "rbw-d"   "Depot — GCP project infrastructure"
66	  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
67	  buz_enroll RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT             "rbw-dL"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_levy"   ""  "Provision GCP depot project"
68	  buz_enroll RBZ_UNMAKE_DEPOT           "rbw-dU"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_unmake"  ""  "Permanently remove a depot"
69	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_DEPOT             "rbw-dl"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"    ""  "List all active depots"
70	  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
71	  buz_enroll RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL        "rbw-dE"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_enshrine"      "param1"  "Enshrine upstream base images to GAR via Cloud Build"
72	  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
73	  buz_enroll RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY     "rbw-dI"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_inscribe"      ""  "Create reliquary: mirror tool images from upstream to GAR"
74	  buz_enroll RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY         "rbw-dY"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_yoke"          "param1"  "Yoke a reliquary stamp into every vessel's rbrv.env (wildcard fan-out)"
75	
76	  # Guide — human-directed procedures (rbw-g)
77	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_GUIDE      "rbw-g"   "Guide — Human-directed procedures"
78	  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
79	  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL          "rbw-gPI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"   ""  "Ingest OAuth credentials from JSON key file"
80	  z_mod="rbh0/rbhp0_cli.sh"
81	  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH        "rbw-gPE" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_establish"       ""  "Guided Manor establishment — GCP project + OAuth consent screen"
82	  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH          "rbw-gPR" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_refresh"         ""  "Refresh expired OAuth tokens"
83	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD            "rbw-gq"  "${z_mod}" "rbhp_quota_build"     ""  "Display Cloud Build capacity review procedure"
84	  # Onboarding — handbook tracks (rbw-o terminal + rbw-O* family, see ₣A6 paddock)
85	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ONBOARDING "rbw-o"   "Onboarding — Handbook restart"
86	  z_mod="rbh0/rbho0_cli.sh"
87	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE    "rbw-o"   "${z_mod}" "rbho_start_here"            ""  "Onboarding start — probe-aware menu into handbook tracks"
88	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRASH_COURSE  "rbw-Occ" "${z_mod}" "rbho_crash_course"          ""  "Crash Course — universal prerequisite: tabtargets, regimes, diagnostic failure"
89	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_RETRIEVER "rbw-Ocr" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_retriever" ""  "Install retriever credentials — place RBRA key file"
90	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR  "rbw-Ocd" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_director"  ""  "Install director credentials — place RBRA key file"
91	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_FIRST_CRUCIBLE "rbw-Ofc" "${z_mod}" "rbho_first_crucible"       ""  "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, rack"
92	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_TADMOR_SECURITY "rbw-Ots" "${z_mod}" "rbho_tadmor_security"     ""  "Verify Crucible containment under attack — charge tadmor and run the adversarial suite"
93	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_FIRST_BUILD "rbw-Odf" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_first_build" "" "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
94	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_AIRGAP     "rbw-Oda" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_airgap"      ""  "Airgap Cloud Build — enshrine, conjure base, conjure airgap, charge moriah, compare plumb"
95	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_BIND       "rbw-Odb" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_bind"        ""  "Bind Cloud Build — pin upstream image by digest, mode-mixture pluml Crucible"
96	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_GRAFT      "rbw-Odg" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_graft"       ""  "Graft Cloud Build — push locally-built image, inspect GRAFTED Vouch verdict"
97	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB      "rbw-Op"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_payor_handbook"       ""  "Payor — establish a Manor and provision the Depot"
98	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_GOVERNOR_HB   "rbw-Og"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_governor_handbook"    ""  "Governor — administer service accounts for directors and retrievers"
99	
100	  # Foundry — registry artifact lifecycle (rbw-f, UPPER=mutates GAR, lower=read/local)
101	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_FOUNDRY    "rbw-f"   "Foundry — Registry artifact lifecycle"
102	  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
103	  buz_enroll RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK        "rbw-fO"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_ordain"          "param1"  "Ordain hallmark: conjure, bind, or graft based on vessel mode"
104	  buz_enroll RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL          "rbw-fk"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_kludge"          "param1"  "Kludge a vessel image locally for development"
105	  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
106	  buz_enroll RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK        "rbw-fA"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_abjure"          "param1"  "Abjure a hallmark (delete artifacts from GAR)"
107	  buz_enroll RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS        "rbw-ft"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_tally"           ""  "Tally hallmarks by health state"

109	  buz_enroll RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS        "rbw-fV"  "${z_mod}" "rbfv_batch_vouch"     ""  "Mode-aware vouch: SLSA (conjure), digest-pin (bind), GRAFTED (graft)"
110	  z_mod="rbfr_cli.sh"
111	  buz_enroll RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK        "rbw-fs"  "${z_mod}" "rbfr_summon"          "param1"  "Summon vouched hallmark image locally"
112	  z_mod="rbfc_cli.sh"
113	  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_FULL             "rbw-fpf" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_full"      "param1"  "Full provenance display (SBOM, build info, Dockerfile)"
114	  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT          "rbw-fpc" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_compact"   "param1"  "Compact provenance summary"
115	
116	  # Ifrit — attack binary (rbw-I)

118	  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
119	  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_IFRIT   "rbw-Ic"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_client"  "imprint"  "Launch Claude Code inside a running bottle for escape testing"
120	  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_SORTIE  "rbw-Is"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_sortie"  "imprint"  "Run automated security test scripts inside the bottle"
121	
122	  # Image — container image operations (rbw-i, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
123	  # Three-domain symmetric: hallmarks (h), reliquaries (r), enshrinements (e).
124	  # Verbs: rekon (member-list), audit (catalog-list), Jettison (delete), wrest (pull).
125	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IMAGE      "rbw-i"   "Image — Container image operations"
126	  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
127	  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_HALLMARK         "rbw-irh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_hallmark"        "param1"  "List ark basenames present under a hallmark's GAR subtree"
128	  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_RELIQUARY        "rbw-irr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_reliquary"       "param1"  "List tool images present under a reliquary stamp's GAR subtree"
129	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_HALLMARKS        "rbw-iah" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_hallmarks"       ""  "Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers"
130	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_RELIQUARIES      "rbw-iar" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_reliquaries"     ""  "Audit reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps"
131	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_ENSHRINEMENTS    "rbw-iae" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_enshrinements"   ""  "Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors"
132	  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_HALLMARK_IMAGE   "rbw-iwh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a hallmark image from registry"
133	  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_RELIQUARY_IMAGE  "rbw-iwr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a reliquary tool image from registry"
134	  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_ENSHRINED_IMAGE  "rbw-iwe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest an enshrined base image from registry"
135	  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_HALLMARK_IMAGE  "rbw-iJh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a hallmark image tag from registry"
136	  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_RELIQUARY_IMAGE "rbw-iJr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a reliquary tool image from registry"
137	  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_ENSHRINEMENT    "rbw-iJe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison an enshrinement from registry"
138	
139	  # Marshal — lifecycle (rbw-M)
140	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_MARSHAL    "rbw-M"   "Marshal — Lifecycle"
141	  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_ZERO           "rbw-MZ"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_zero"      ""  "Zero regime to blank template"
142	  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_PROOF          "rbw-MP"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_proof"     ""  "Proof repo for release testing"
143	  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_GENERATE       "rbw-MG"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_generate"  ""  "Generate tabtarget context from zipper registry"
144	
145	  # Nameplate — cross-nameplate operations (rbw-n)
146	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_NAMEPLATE  "rbw-n"   "Nameplate — Cross-nameplate operations"
147	  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
148	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_NAMEPLATES        "rbw-rnl" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_list"    ""  "List all nameplates"
149	  buz_enroll RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES      "rbw-ni"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_survey"  ""  "Survey nameplate status"
150	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES       "rbw-nv"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_audit"   ""  "Validate all nameplates"
151	
152	  # Regime — config files (rbw-r)
153	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_REGIME     "rbw-r"   "Regime — Config files"
154	  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
155	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE       "rbw-rnr" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_render"    "param1"  "Render nameplate regime"
156	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE     "rbw-rnv" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_validate"  "param1"  "Validate nameplate regime"
157	  z_mod="rbrv_cli.sh"
158	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_VESSELS           "rbw-rvl" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_list"      ""        "List vessel regimes"
159	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL          "rbw-rvr" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_render"    "param1"  "Render vessel regime"
160	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL        "rbw-rvv" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_validate"  "param1"  "Validate vessel regime"
161	  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
162	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_REPO            "rbw-rrr" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_render"    ""  "Render repo regime"
163	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO          "rbw-rrv" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_validate"  ""  "Validate repo regime"
164	  z_mod="rbrp_cli.sh"
165	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR           "rbw-rpr" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_render"    ""  "Render payor regime"
166	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR         "rbw-rpv" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_validate"  ""  "Validate payor regime"
167	  z_mod="rbro_cli.sh"
168	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH           "rbw-ror" "${z_mod}" "rbro_render"    ""  "Render OAuth regime"
169	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH         "rbw-rov" "${z_mod}" "rbro_validate"  ""  "Validate OAuth regime"
170	  z_mod="rbrs_cli.sh"
171	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_STATION         "rbw-rsr" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_render"    ""  "Render station regime"
172	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION       "rbw-rsv" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_validate"  ""  "Validate station regime"
173	  z_mod="rbra_cli.sh"
174	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_AUTH            "rbw-rar" "${z_mod}" "rbra_render"    "param1"  "Render auth regime"
175	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH          "rbw-rav" "${z_mod}" "rbra_validate"  "param1"  "Validate auth regime"
176	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_AUTH              "rbw-ral" "${z_mod}" "rbra_list"      ""        "List auth regimes"
177	
178	  # Theurge — test infrastructure (rbw-t)
179	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_THEURGE    "rbw-t"   "Theurge — Test infrastructure"
180	  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
181	  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_KLUDGE  "rbw-tK"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge"        "imprint"  "Local kludge build + install hallmark into nameplate"
182	  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_ORDAIN  "rbw-tO"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ordain"        "imprint"  "Cloud build + install hallmark into nameplate"
183	  z_mod="rbq_cli.sh"
184	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_FAST     "rbw-tf"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_fast"     ""        "Fast qualify: tabtargets, colophons, nameplate health"
185	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_RELEASE  "rbw-tr"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_release"  ""        "Release qualify: + shellcheck, full test suite"
186	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_PRISTINE "rbw-tP"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_pristine" ""        "Pristine qualify: gauntlet test suite (release gate)"
187	
188	  # Handbook — human-facing procedures (rbw-h0 index, rbw-hw/HW* windows)
189	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_HANDBOOK   "rbw-HW"  "Handbook — Human-facing procedures"
190	  z_mod="rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh"
191	  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_TOP           "rbw-h0"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_handbook_top"              ""        "Top-level handbook index across all groups"
192	  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_WINDOWS       "rbw-hw"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_top"                       ""        "Windows test infrastructure orchestrator"
193	  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_DESKTOP     "rbw-HWdd"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_desktop"            ""        "Docker Desktop install"
194	  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_WSL_NATIVE  "rbw-HWdw"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_wsl_native"         "param1"  "Native dockerd in WSL"
195	  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_CONTEXT     "rbw-HWdc"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_context_discipline" ""        "Deterministic daemon selection"
196	
197	  readonly ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST="${z_buz_colophon_roll[*]}"
198	
199	  readonly ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
200	}
201	
202	######################################################################
203	# Healthcheck (validates all enrolled tabtargets exist on disk)
204	
205	zrbz_healthcheck() {
206	  zrbz_sentinel
207	  buz_healthcheck
208	}
209	
210	######################################################################
211	# Internal sentinel
212	
213	zrbz_sentinel() {
214	  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
215	}
216	
217	# eof
218

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion guard
test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBZ_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Colophon registry initialization

zrbz_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"

  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
  zbuz_sentinel

  # Accounts — Google Cloud service accounts (rbw-a)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ACCOUNTS   "rbw-a"   "Accounts — Service account management"
  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR         "rbw-aM"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_mantle"       ""        "Create/replace governor service account"
  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_retriever"      "param1"  "Invest a Retriever service account for an identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_director"       "param1"  "Invest a Director service account for an identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_retriever"      "param1"  "Divest a Retriever service account by identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_director"       "param1"  "Divest a Director service account by identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_RETRIEVERS       "rbw-arr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_retrievers"     ""        "Roster Retriever service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_DIRECTORS        "rbw-adr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_directors"      ""        "Roster Director service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"

  # Crucible — container runtime (rbw-c)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_CRUCIBLE   "rbw-c"   "Crucible — Container runtime"
  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE  "rbw-cC"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_charge"       "imprint"  "Charge crucible (sentry + pentacle + bottle containers)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH  "rbw-cQ"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_quench"       "imprint"  "Quench crucible"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SSH     "rbw-cS"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ssh"          "imprint"  "SSH into the bottle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_HAIL    "rbw-ch"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_hail"         "param1"   "Shell into the sentry container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK    "rbw-cr"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_rack"         "param1"   "Shell into the bottle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SCRY    "rbw-cs"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_scry"         "param1"   "Observe network traffic on crucible containers"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_WRIT    "rbw-cw"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_writ"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in sentry container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_FIAT    "rbw-cf"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_fiat"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in pentacle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_BARK    "rbw-cb"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_bark"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in bottle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_ACTIVE  "rbw-cic" "${z_mod}" "rbob_charged"      "param1"   "Check if crucible is currently charged"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE "rbw-cKB" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_bottle" "param1" "Kludge bottle vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_SENTRY "rbw-cKS" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_sentry" "param1" "Kludge sentry vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"

  # Depot — GCP project infrastructure (rbw-d, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_DEPOT      "rbw-d"   "Depot — GCP project infrastructure"
  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT             "rbw-dL"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_levy"   ""  "Provision GCP depot project"
  buz_enroll RBZ_UNMAKE_DEPOT           "rbw-dU"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_unmake"  ""  "Permanently remove a depot"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_DEPOT             "rbw-dl"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"    ""  "List all active depots"
  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL        "rbw-dE"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_enshrine"      "param1"  "Enshrine upstream base images to GAR via Cloud Build"
  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY     "rbw-dI"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_inscribe"      ""  "Create reliquary: mirror tool images from upstream to GAR"
  buz_enroll RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY         "rbw-dY"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_yoke"          "param1"  "Yoke a reliquary stamp into every vessel's rbrv.env (wildcard fan-out)"

  # Guide — human-directed procedures (rbw-g)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_GUIDE      "rbw-g"   "Guide — Human-directed procedures"
  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL          "rbw-gPI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"   ""  "Ingest OAuth credentials from JSON key file"
  z_mod="rbh0/rbhp0_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH        "rbw-gPE" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_establish"       ""  "Guided Manor establishment — GCP project + OAuth consent screen"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH          "rbw-gPR" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_refresh"         ""  "Refresh expired OAuth tokens"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD            "rbw-gq"  "${z_mod}" "rbhp_quota_build"     ""  "Display Cloud Build capacity review procedure"
  # Onboarding — handbook tracks (rbw-o terminal + rbw-O* family, see ₣A6 paddock)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ONBOARDING "rbw-o"   "Onboarding — Handbook restart"
  z_mod="rbh0/rbho0_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE    "rbw-o"   "${z_mod}" "rbho_start_here"            ""  "Onboarding start — probe-aware menu into handbook tracks"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRASH_COURSE  "rbw-Occ" "${z_mod}" "rbho_crash_course"          ""  "Crash Course — universal prerequisite: tabtargets, regimes, diagnostic failure"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_RETRIEVER "rbw-Ocr" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_retriever" ""  "Install retriever credentials — place RBRA key file"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR  "rbw-Ocd" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_director"  ""  "Install director credentials — place RBRA key file"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_FIRST_CRUCIBLE "rbw-Ofc" "${z_mod}" "rbho_first_crucible"       ""  "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, rack"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_TADMOR_SECURITY "rbw-Ots" "${z_mod}" "rbho_tadmor_security"     ""  "Verify Crucible containment under attack — charge tadmor and run the adversarial suite"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_FIRST_BUILD "rbw-Odf" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_first_build" "" "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_AIRGAP     "rbw-Oda" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_airgap"      ""  "Airgap Cloud Build — enshrine, conjure base, conjure airgap, charge moriah, compare plumb"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_BIND       "rbw-Odb" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_bind"        ""  "Bind Cloud Build — pin upstream image by digest, mode-mixture pluml Crucible"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_GRAFT      "rbw-Odg" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_graft"       ""  "Graft Cloud Build — push locally-built image, inspect GRAFTED Vouch verdict"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB      "rbw-Op"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_payor_handbook"       ""  "Payor — establish a Manor and provision the Depot"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_GOVERNOR_HB   "rbw-Og"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_governor_handbook"    ""  "Governor — administer service accounts for directors and retrievers"

  # Foundry — registry artifact lifecycle (rbw-f, UPPER=mutates GAR, lower=read/local)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_FOUNDRY    "rbw-f"   "Foundry — Registry artifact lifecycle"
  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK        "rbw-fO"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_ordain"          "param1"  "Ordain hallmark: conjure, bind, or graft based on vessel mode"
  buz_enroll RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL          "rbw-fk"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_kludge"          "param1"  "Kludge a vessel image locally for development"
  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK        "rbw-fA"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_abjure"          "param1"  "Abjure a hallmark (delete artifacts from GAR)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS        "rbw-ft"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_tally"           ""  "Tally hallmarks by health state"
  z_mod="rbfv_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS        "rbw-fV"  "${z_mod}" "rbfv_batch_vouch"     ""  "Mode-aware vouch: SLSA (conjure), digest-pin (bind), GRAFTED (graft)"
  z_mod="rbfr_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK        "rbw-fs"  "${z_mod}" "rbfr_summon"          "param1"  "Summon vouched hallmark image locally"
  z_mod="rbfc_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_FULL             "rbw-fpf" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_full"      "param1"  "Full provenance display (SBOM, build info, Dockerfile)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT          "rbw-fpc" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_compact"   "param1"  "Compact provenance summary"

  # Ifrit — attack binary (rbw-I)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IFRIT      "rbw-I"   "Ifrit — Attack binary"
  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_IFRIT   "rbw-Ic"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_client"  "imprint"  "Launch Claude Code inside a running bottle for escape testing"
  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_SORTIE  "rbw-Is"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_sortie"  "imprint"  "Run automated security test scripts inside the bottle"

  # Image — container image operations (rbw-i, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
  # Three-domain symmetric: hallmarks (h), reliquaries (r), enshrinements (e).
  # Verbs: rekon (member-list), audit (catalog-list), Jettison (delete), wrest (pull).
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IMAGE      "rbw-i"   "Image — Container image operations"
  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_HALLMARK         "rbw-irh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_hallmark"        "param1"  "List ark basenames present under a hallmark's GAR subtree"
  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_RELIQUARY        "rbw-irr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_reliquary"       "param1"  "List tool images present under a reliquary stamp's GAR subtree"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_HALLMARKS        "rbw-iah" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_hallmarks"       ""  "Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_RELIQUARIES      "rbw-iar" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_reliquaries"     ""  "Audit reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_ENSHRINEMENTS    "rbw-iae" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_enshrinements"   ""  "Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors"
  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_HALLMARK_IMAGE   "rbw-iwh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a hallmark image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_RELIQUARY_IMAGE  "rbw-iwr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a reliquary tool image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_ENSHRINED_IMAGE  "rbw-iwe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest an enshrined base image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_HALLMARK_IMAGE  "rbw-iJh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a hallmark image tag from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_RELIQUARY_IMAGE "rbw-iJr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a reliquary tool image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_ENSHRINEMENT    "rbw-iJe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison an enshrinement from registry"

  # Marshal — lifecycle (rbw-M)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_MARSHAL    "rbw-M"   "Marshal — Lifecycle"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_ZERO           "rbw-MZ"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_zero"      ""  "Zero regime to blank template"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_PROOF          "rbw-MP"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_proof"     ""  "Proof repo for release testing"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_GENERATE       "rbw-MG"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_generate"  ""  "Generate tabtarget context from zipper registry"

  # Nameplate — cross-nameplate operations (rbw-n)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_NAMEPLATE  "rbw-n"   "Nameplate — Cross-nameplate operations"
  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_NAMEPLATES        "rbw-rnl" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_list"    ""  "List all nameplates"
  buz_enroll RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES      "rbw-ni"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_survey"  ""  "Survey nameplate status"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES       "rbw-nv"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_audit"   ""  "Validate all nameplates"

  # Regime — config files (rbw-r)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_REGIME     "rbw-r"   "Regime — Config files"
  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE       "rbw-rnr" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_render"    "param1"  "Render nameplate regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE     "rbw-rnv" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_validate"  "param1"  "Validate nameplate regime"
  z_mod="rbrv_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_VESSELS           "rbw-rvl" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_list"      ""        "List vessel regimes"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL          "rbw-rvr" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_render"    "param1"  "Render vessel regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL        "rbw-rvv" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_validate"  "param1"  "Validate vessel regime"
  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_REPO            "rbw-rrr" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_render"    ""  "Render repo regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO          "rbw-rrv" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_validate"  ""  "Validate repo regime"
  z_mod="rbrp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR           "rbw-rpr" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_render"    ""  "Render payor regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR         "rbw-rpv" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_validate"  ""  "Validate payor regime"
  z_mod="rbro_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH           "rbw-ror" "${z_mod}" "rbro_render"    ""  "Render OAuth regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH         "rbw-rov" "${z_mod}" "rbro_validate"  ""  "Validate OAuth regime"
  z_mod="rbrs_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_STATION         "rbw-rsr" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_render"    ""  "Render station regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION       "rbw-rsv" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_validate"  ""  "Validate station regime"
  z_mod="rbra_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_AUTH            "rbw-rar" "${z_mod}" "rbra_render"    "param1"  "Render auth regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH          "rbw-rav" "${z_mod}" "rbra_validate"  "param1"  "Validate auth regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_AUTH              "rbw-ral" "${z_mod}" "rbra_list"      ""        "List auth regimes"

  # Theurge — test infrastructure (rbw-t)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_THEURGE    "rbw-t"   "Theurge — Test infrastructure"
  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_KLUDGE  "rbw-tK"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge"        "imprint"  "Local kludge build + install hallmark into nameplate"
  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_ORDAIN  "rbw-tO"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ordain"        "imprint"  "Cloud build + install hallmark into nameplate"
  z_mod="rbq_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_FAST     "rbw-tf"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_fast"     ""        "Fast qualify: tabtargets, colophons, nameplate health"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_RELEASE  "rbw-tr"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_release"  ""        "Release qualify: + shellcheck, full test suite"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_PRISTINE "rbw-tP"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_pristine" ""        "Pristine qualify: gauntlet test suite (release gate)"

  # Handbook — human-facing procedures (rbw-h0 index, rbw-hw/HW* windows)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_HANDBOOK   "rbw-HW"  "Handbook — Human-facing procedures"
  z_mod="rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_TOP           "rbw-h0"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_handbook_top"              ""        "Top-level handbook index across all groups"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_WINDOWS       "rbw-hw"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_top"                       ""        "Windows test infrastructure orchestrator"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_DESKTOP     "rbw-HWdd"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_desktop"            ""        "Docker Desktop install"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_WSL_NATIVE  "rbw-HWdw"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_wsl_native"         "param1"  "Native dockerd in WSL"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_CONTEXT     "rbw-HWdc"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_context_discipline" ""        "Deterministic daemon selection"

  readonly ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST="${z_buz_colophon_roll[*]}"

  readonly ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
}

######################################################################
# Healthcheck (validates all enrolled tabtargets exist on disk)

zrbz_healthcheck() {
  zrbz_sentinel
  buz_healthcheck
}

######################################################################
# Internal sentinel

zrbz_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
}

1117	rbgp_depot_list() {
1118	  zrbgp_sentinel
1119	
1120	  buc_doc_brief "List all depot instances and their status"
1121	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1122	
1123	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
1124	  local z_token
1125	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
1126	
1127	  buc_step 'Probe depot states and emit per-moniker fact files'
1128	  zrbgp_depot_state_emit "${z_token}"
1129	
1130	  buc_step 'Render depot summary'
1131	  local z_total_count=0
1132	  local z_complete_count=0
1133	  local z_delete_requested_count=0
1134	
1135	  buc_info ""
1136	  buc_info "=== DEPOT SUMMARY ==="
1137	  printf "%-40s %s\n" "PROJECT_ID" "STATUS"
1138	
1139	  # Per-iteration synthesized locals (BCG exception 2)
1140	  local z_fact_path=""
1141	  local z_basename=""
1142	  local z_moniker=""
1143	  local z_project_id=""
1144	  local z_project_fact_path=""
1145	  local z_state=""
1146	
1147	  # Walk emitted depot fact files; stem is the moniker, content is the state.
1148	  # The sidecar depot-project fact file carries the canonical project_id.
1149	  shopt -s nullglob
1150	  for z_fact_path in "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}"/*.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}; do
1151	    z_basename="${z_fact_path##*/}"
1152	    z_moniker="${z_basename%.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}}"
1153	    z_project_fact_path="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_moniker}.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}"
1154	    z_state=$(<"${z_fact_path}")
1155	    test -n "${z_state}" || buc_die "Empty state in fact file: ${z_fact_path}"
1156	    test -f "${z_project_fact_path}" || buc_die "Missing depot-project fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"
1157	    z_project_id=$(<"${z_project_fact_path}")
1158	    test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"
1159	
1160	    printf "%-40s %s\n" "${z_project_id}" "${z_state}"
1161	    z_total_count=$((z_total_count + 1))
1162	    case "${z_state}" in
1163	      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}")          z_complete_count=$((z_complete_count + 1)) ;;
1164	      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}")  z_delete_requested_count=$((z_delete_requested_count + 1)) ;;
1165	    esac
1166	  done
1167	  shopt -u nullglob
1168	
1169	  if test "${z_total_count}" -eq 0; then
1170	    buc_info "No depot projects found"
1171	    return 0
1172	  fi
1173	
1174	  buc_info ""
1175	  buc_info "=== SUMMARY ==="
1176	  buc_info "Total depots:     ${z_total_count}"
1177	  buc_info "Complete:         ${z_complete_count}"
1178	  buc_info "Delete-requested: ${z_delete_requested_count}"
1179	}
1180	
1181	rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh() {
1182	  zrbgp_sentinel
1183	
1184	  buc_doc_brief "Refresh expired OAuth credentials following RBAGS manual procedure"
1185	  buc_doc_lines "Use this when OAuth tokens expire after 6 months or are compromised"
1186	  buc_doc_lines "Requires downloading new OAuth JSON from Google Cloud Console"
1187	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1188	
1189	  buc_step 'Display OAuth refresh procedure'
1190	  buc_info ""
1191	  buc_info "=== Manual Payor OAuth Refresh Procedure ==="
1192	  buc_info ""
1193	  buc_info "OAuth credentials need to be refreshed. Follow these steps:"
1194	  buc_info ""
1195	  buc_info "1. Navigate to APIs & Services > Credentials in Payor Project"
1196	  buc_info "   Console URL: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
1197	  buc_info ""
1198	  buc_info "2. Find existing 'Recipe Bottle Payor' OAuth client"
1199	  buc_info ""  
1200	  buc_info "3. Download new JSON credentials:"
1201	  buc_info "   - Click the download icon next to the OAuth client"
1202	  buc_info "   - Or regenerate client secret if compromised"
1203	  buc_info ""
1204	  date +%Y%m%d > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
1205	  local z_today_stamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
1206	  buc_info "4. Save as timestamped file:"
1207	  buc_info "   - Example: payor-oauth-${z_today_stamp}.json"
1208	  buc_info ""
1209	  buc_info "5. Run installation command with new JSON:"
1210	  buc_info "   rbgp_payor_install /path/to/payor-oauth-[timestamp].json"
1211	  buc_info ""
1212	  buc_info "This will regenerate OAuth credentials and update RBRO file."
1213	  buc_info ""
1214	  
1215	  buc_success "OAuth refresh procedure displayed"
1216	  buc_info "Note: OAuth refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use in testing mode"
1217	  buc_info "Any successful payor operation resets the 6-month timer"
1218	}
1219	
1220	rbgp_governor_mantle() {
1221	  zrbgp_sentinel
1222	
1223	  local -r z_depot_project_id="${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1224	
1225	  buc_doc_brief "Create or replace Governor service account in a depot"
1226	  buc_doc_lines "This operation is idempotent: existing governor-* SAs are deleted before creating a new one"
1227	  buc_doc_lines "Targets depot derived from RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX + RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER (RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID)"
1228	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1229	
1230	  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
1231	  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty — set RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER in rbrr.env"
1232	
1233	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
1234	  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
1235	  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"
1236	
1237	  local z_token
1238	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
1239	
1240	  buc_step 'Validate depot project exists and is active'
1241	  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
1242	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
1243	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
1244	
1245	  local z_lifecycle_state
1246	  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}" '.state') || buc_die "Failed to get project state"
1247	  test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "ACTIVE" || buc_die "Depot project is not ACTIVE (state: ${z_lifecycle_state})"
1248	
1249	  test "${z_depot_project_id}" != "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}" || buc_die "Cannot create Governor in Payor project"
1250	
1251	  buc_step 'Clean up existing governor-* service accounts (404-tolerant)'
1252	  local -r z_sa_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
1253	  local z_deleted_count=0
1254	  local z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
1255	  local z_mantle_sa_page=1
1256	  local z_mantle_sa_url=""
1257	  local z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=""
1258	  local z_mantle_sa_infix=""
1259	  local z_mantle_sa_count=0
1260	  local z_mantle_sa_index=0
1261	  local z_mantle_sa_email=""
1262	  local z_mantle_delete_infix=""
1263	  local z_mantle_delete_attempt=0
1264	  local z_mantle_delete_code=""
1265	  while :; do
1266	    z_mantle_sa_url="${z_sa_list_url}"
1267	    if test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}"; then
1268	      z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}") \
1269	        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
1270	      z_mantle_sa_url="${z_mantle_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_mantle_sa_tok_enc}"
1271	    fi
1272	    z_mantle_sa_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_LIST_SA}_${z_mantle_sa_page}"
1273	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_mantle_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"
1274	    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_mantle_sa_page})" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"
1275	
1276	    z_mantle_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
1277	      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"
1278	
1279	    z_mantle_sa_index=0
1280	    while test "${z_mantle_sa_index}" -lt "${z_mantle_sa_count}"; do
1281	      z_mantle_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_mantle_sa_index}].email") \
1282	        || { z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
1283	      if [[ "${z_mantle_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
1284	        buc_log_args "Deleting existing governor SA: ${z_mantle_sa_email}"
1285	        z_mantle_delete_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_DELETE_SA}_${z_mantle_delete_attempt}"
1286	        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_sa_list_url}/${z_mantle_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_delete_infix}"
1287	        z_mantle_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_mantle_delete_infix}") || z_mantle_delete_code=""
1288	        case "${z_mantle_delete_code}" in
1289	          200|204) z_deleted_count=$((z_deleted_count + 1)) ;;
1290	          404)     buc_log_args "SA already deleted: ${z_mantle_sa_email}" ;;
1291	          *)       buc_warn "Failed to delete SA ${z_mantle_sa_email}: HTTP ${z_mantle_delete_code}" ;;
1292	        esac
1293	        z_mantle_delete_attempt=$((z_mantle_delete_attempt + 1))
1294	      fi
1295	      z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1))
1296	    done
1297	
1298	    z_mantle_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
1299	      || z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
1300	    test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}" || break
1301	    z_mantle_sa_page=$((z_mantle_sa_page + 1))
1302	  done
1303	
1304	  buc_info "Deleted ${z_deleted_count} existing governor service account(s)"
1305

1307	  local z_timestamp

1309	    || buc_die "Failed to generate timestamp"
1310	  z_timestamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
1311	  local -r z_governor_account_id="${RBCC_role_governor}-${z_timestamp}"
1312	  local z_governor_email

rbgp_depot_list() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "List all depot instances and their status"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Probe depot states and emit per-moniker fact files'
  zrbgp_depot_state_emit "${z_token}"

  buc_step 'Render depot summary'
  local z_total_count=0
  local z_complete_count=0
  local z_delete_requested_count=0

  buc_info ""
  buc_info "=== DEPOT SUMMARY ==="
  printf "%-40s %s\n" "PROJECT_ID" "STATUS"

  # Per-iteration synthesized locals (BCG exception 2)
  local z_fact_path=""
  local z_basename=""
  local z_moniker=""
  local z_project_id=""
  local z_project_fact_path=""
  local z_state=""

  # Walk emitted depot fact files; stem is the moniker, content is the state.
  # The sidecar depot-project fact file carries the canonical project_id.
  shopt -s nullglob
  for z_fact_path in "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}"/*.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}; do
    z_basename="${z_fact_path##*/}"
    z_moniker="${z_basename%.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}}"
    z_project_fact_path="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_moniker}.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}"
    z_state=$(<"${z_fact_path}")
    test -n "${z_state}" || buc_die "Empty state in fact file: ${z_fact_path}"
    test -f "${z_project_fact_path}" || buc_die "Missing depot-project fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"
    z_project_id=$(<"${z_project_fact_path}")
    test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"

    printf "%-40s %s\n" "${z_project_id}" "${z_state}"
    z_total_count=$((z_total_count + 1))
    case "${z_state}" in
      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}")          z_complete_count=$((z_complete_count + 1)) ;;
      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}")  z_delete_requested_count=$((z_delete_requested_count + 1)) ;;
    esac
  done
  shopt -u nullglob

  if test "${z_total_count}" -eq 0; then
    buc_info "No depot projects found"
    return 0
  fi

  buc_info ""
  buc_info "=== SUMMARY ==="
  buc_info "Total depots:     ${z_total_count}"
  buc_info "Complete:         ${z_complete_count}"
  buc_info "Delete-requested: ${z_delete_requested_count}"
}

rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Refresh expired OAuth credentials following RBAGS manual procedure"
  buc_doc_lines "Use this when OAuth tokens expire after 6 months or are compromised"
  buc_doc_lines "Requires downloading new OAuth JSON from Google Cloud Console"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Display OAuth refresh procedure'
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "=== Manual Payor OAuth Refresh Procedure ==="
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "OAuth credentials need to be refreshed. Follow these steps:"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "1. Navigate to APIs & Services > Credentials in Payor Project"
  buc_info "   Console URL: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "2. Find existing 'Recipe Bottle Payor' OAuth client"
  buc_info ""  
  buc_info "3. Download new JSON credentials:"
  buc_info "   - Click the download icon next to the OAuth client"
  buc_info "   - Or regenerate client secret if compromised"
  buc_info ""
  date +%Y%m%d > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
  local z_today_stamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
  buc_info "4. Save as timestamped file:"
  buc_info "   - Example: payor-oauth-${z_today_stamp}.json"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "5. Run installation command with new JSON:"
  buc_info "   rbgp_payor_install /path/to/payor-oauth-[timestamp].json"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "This will regenerate OAuth credentials and update RBRO file."
  buc_info ""
  
  buc_success "OAuth refresh procedure displayed"
  buc_info "Note: OAuth refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use in testing mode"
  buc_info "Any successful payor operation resets the 6-month timer"
}

rbgp_governor_mantle() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  local -r z_depot_project_id="${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

  buc_doc_brief "Create or replace Governor service account in a depot"
  buc_doc_lines "This operation is idempotent: existing governor-* SAs are deleted before creating a new one"
  buc_doc_lines "Targets depot derived from RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX + RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER (RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty — set RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER in rbrr.env"

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"

  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Validate depot project exists and is active'
  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"

  local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}" '.state') || buc_die "Failed to get project state"
  test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "ACTIVE" || buc_die "Depot project is not ACTIVE (state: ${z_lifecycle_state})"

  test "${z_depot_project_id}" != "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}" || buc_die "Cannot create Governor in Payor project"

  buc_step 'Clean up existing governor-* service accounts (404-tolerant)'
  local -r z_sa_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
  local z_deleted_count=0
  local z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
  local z_mantle_sa_page=1
  local z_mantle_sa_url=""
  local z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=""
  local z_mantle_sa_infix=""
  local z_mantle_sa_count=0
  local z_mantle_sa_index=0
  local z_mantle_sa_email=""
  local z_mantle_delete_infix=""
  local z_mantle_delete_attempt=0
  local z_mantle_delete_code=""
  while :; do
    z_mantle_sa_url="${z_sa_list_url}"
    if test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}"; then
      z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}") \
        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
      z_mantle_sa_url="${z_mantle_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_mantle_sa_tok_enc}"
    fi
    z_mantle_sa_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_LIST_SA}_${z_mantle_sa_page}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_mantle_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"
    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_mantle_sa_page})" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"

    z_mantle_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"

    z_mantle_sa_index=0
    while test "${z_mantle_sa_index}" -lt "${z_mantle_sa_count}"; do
      z_mantle_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_mantle_sa_index}].email") \
        || { z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
      if [[ "${z_mantle_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Deleting existing governor SA: ${z_mantle_sa_email}"
        z_mantle_delete_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_DELETE_SA}_${z_mantle_delete_attempt}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_sa_list_url}/${z_mantle_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_delete_infix}"
        z_mantle_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_mantle_delete_infix}") || z_mantle_delete_code=""
        case "${z_mantle_delete_code}" in
          200|204) z_deleted_count=$((z_deleted_count + 1)) ;;
          404)     buc_log_args "SA already deleted: ${z_mantle_sa_email}" ;;
          *)       buc_warn "Failed to delete SA ${z_mantle_sa_email}: HTTP ${z_mantle_delete_code}" ;;
        esac
        z_mantle_delete_attempt=$((z_mantle_delete_attempt + 1))
      fi
      z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1))
    done

    z_mantle_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
      || z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
    test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}" || break
    z_mantle_sa_page=$((z_mantle_sa_page + 1))
  done

  buc_info "Deleted ${z_deleted_count} existing governor service account(s)"

  buc_step 'Generate Governor timestamp and account ID'
  local z_timestamp
  date +%Y%m%d%H%M > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to generate timestamp"
  z_timestamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
  local -r z_governor_account_id="${RBCC_role_governor}-${z_timestamp}"
  local z_governor_email
  z_governor_email=$(rbgu_sa_email_capture "${z_governor_account_id}" "${z_depot_project_id}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose Governor email"

  buc_log_args "Governor account ID: ${z_governor_account_id}"
